---
title: "Setup – Practical 2 Tools"
subtitle: "car · poolfstat · samtools · bwa · java · npstat · popoolation2"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
---

This notebook installs the shared local tools needed for **Practical 2** and
activates them for the current R session.

It covers:

- `car`
- `poolfstat`
- `samtools`
- `bwa`
- `java`
- `npstat`
- `popoolation2`

Run the second chunk once. Re-running it is safe.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, comment = "")

find_repo_root <- function(start = getwd()) {
  path <- normalizePath(start, mustWork = TRUE)
  for (i in seq_len(10)) {
    if (file.exists(file.path(path, "setup", "setup_practical2_tools.sh"))) {
      return(path)
    }
    parent <- dirname(path)
    if (parent == path) break
    path <- parent
  }
  # Fallback for Renku / standard deployment
  "/home/rstudio/work/Evolutionary-Genomics-UNIFR-2026-SBL.20034"
}

repo_root  <- find_repo_root()
tools_dir  <- file.path(repo_root, "tools")
bin_dir    <- file.path(tools_dir, "bin")
env2_dir   <- file.path(tools_dir, "env2")
perl5_dir  <- file.path(tools_dir, "perl5", "lib", "perl5")
installer  <- file.path(repo_root, "setup", "setup_practical2_tools.sh")

cat("repo_root :", repo_root, "\n")
cat("tools_dir :", tools_dir, "\n")
cat("installer :", installer, "\n")
stopifnot("Installer script not found – check repo_root above" = file.exists(installer))
```

```{r install-and-activate, eval=FALSE}
stopifnot(file.exists(installer))
ret <- system2("bash", installer)
if (ret != 0L) stop("Installer exited with code ", ret, ". Check the output above.")

Sys.setenv(
  PATH = paste(bin_dir,
               file.path(env2_dir, "bin"),
               Sys.getenv("PATH"),
               sep = ":"),
  LD_LIBRARY_PATH = paste(file.path(env2_dir, "lib"),
                          Sys.getenv("LD_LIBRARY_PATH"),
                          sep = ":"),
  PERL5LIB = paste(perl5_dir,
                   Sys.getenv("PERL5LIB"),
                   sep = ":")
)

r_pkgs <- c(
  "car",
  "poolfstat"
)

missing_pkgs <- r_pkgs[!vapply(r_pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly = TRUE)]

if (length(missing_pkgs) > 0) {
  message("Installing missing R packages: ", paste(missing_pkgs, collapse = ", "))
  if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages("renv", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
  }
  renv::consent(provided = TRUE)
  if (!file.exists(file.path(repo_root, "renv", "activate.R"))) {
    renv::init(project = repo_root, bare = TRUE, restart = FALSE)
  }
  renv::install(missing_pkgs, project = repo_root, prompt = FALSE)
} else {
  message("All R packages already installed.")
}

tools_to_check <- c(
  "samtools",
  "bwa",
  "java",
  "npstat",
  "fst-sliding.pl",
  "Variance-sliding.pl",
  "fisher-test.pl"
)

cat("\n--- CLI tools ---\n")
for (t in tools_to_check) {
  path <- Sys.which(t)
  if (nchar(path) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("  %-30s  %s\n", t, path))
  } else {
    cat(sprintf("  %-30s  NOT FOUND\n", t))
  }
}

cat("\n--- samtools version ---\n")
system("samtools --version 2>&1 | head -2")

cat("\n--- bwa version ---\n")
system("bwa 2>&1 | head -3")

cat("\n--- java version ---\n")
system("java -version 2>&1")

cat("\n--- npstat version ---\n")
system("npstat --help 2>&1 | head -5")

cat("\n--- popoolation2 (fst-sliding.pl) ---\n")
system("fst-sliding.pl --help 2>&1 | head -5")

cat("\n--- R packages ---\n")
for (pkg in c("car", "poolfstat")) {
  installed <- requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("  %-15s  %s\n", pkg, if (installed) "OK" else "MISSING"))
}

cat("\n--- tools/bin contents ---\n")
cat(paste(sort(list.files(bin_dir)), collapse = "\n"), "\n")
```
